title: [WIP] Support labels and filters
body:
Support labelling secrets on create
Support filtering secrets on list by id, name, label, driver

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

<!--

-->

comments.body:

You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @saschagrunert` in a comment when ready. Needs a change a common, so I currently have go mod pointing to my current branch. Once this goes green I can get the common fixes in and then vendor it in in this PR :)
